gothComponent showcase
OverviewPrimitivesFormsInteractiveHTMX

Showcase

Interactive runtime

The widgets keep their markup server-rendered and attach behavior with stable `data-ui-*` hooks.

Overlays

Review rollout

This dialog is opened by the delegated runtime and closes on Escape.

The dialog content stays in place in the DOM and relies on focus restoration instead of portals.

Deployment details

The sheet shares the same runtime state model as the dialog.

This panel uses the right edge of the viewport and the same close affordances.

Menus and tabs

View logs

The overview panel is visible on first paint.

The tabs runtime handles keyboard navigation with arrow keys.

Panels remain server-rendered HTML; the runtime only manages state.

Toast

Settings saved

The toast uses the same delegated runtime hooks as the other widgets.
